name: Ringo-chan
description: The Student Council President of Sanada East High. She is full of pride and has a short temper. But she is a bit of an airhead, which leads her to getting tricked very easily, like mistaking Karasawa's snoring for a cat's meow and standing on a step ladder in the Sanada North High Student Council Room to connect an internet cable to a intentionally misplaced router just so the Council could look at her panties from underneath. The Sanada North High Student Council has given her the nickname "Ringo-chan." She's actually popular and is usually hit on, much to her ignorance.  (Source: Wikipedia)
